envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key, from simmer.markets/dashboard (SDK tab). Requires a Pro plan (reactor signals are Pro-gated).

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Your Polymarket wallet private key, for external/OWS self-custody trading. Not needed in dry-run.

tunables.label: Per-shock stake (USDC, split across the 4 rungs)
